title: Buggy’s Cannon Threatens Orange Town
description: On pages 9–12, Buggy’s crew threatens Orange Town with overwhelming force, turning the town itself into a hostage.
scene: Buggy’s pirates rely on spectacle and destruction, while Luffy, Zoro, and Nami are forced to react under pressure.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'll hold Zolo down!! You finish him off!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Keep it your mitts out of Zolo's duel!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Don't need the captain to lend me a hand to kill YOU!!

summary: The part shows how Buggy rules through fear, while the Straw Hats begin breaking that fear through defiance and improvisation.
